// INSTRUCTIONS: Copy this file to 'background-project-config.json' (same folder) and customize for your project.
// artifactSubpath: The company/product subfolder under AppData/LocalLow where Unity writes test results.
// buildMethodMap: Maps framework IDs to C# build methods. Each entry needs 'validation' and 'steam' variants.
// primaryInstance: Editor-side tools continue using this instance as the legacy single background project.
// instances: Define any number of named background project instances. Each instance may also declare githubRunner settings.
